title: Blue Dart Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Blue Dart Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Blue Dart Digital Technologies family as a E-commerce Executive in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Blue Dart Digital Technologies:
Blue Dart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
